Name.jp: インクイジター・火炙りの刑

description.en: Attacks an enemy and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the start of the turn, increases duration of <color=#28d9ed>debuffs</color> on all enemies by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>の持続ターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>増加させる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 시작 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color> 지속 턴을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合开始时,使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>持续回合增加1回合</color> 。
